title: chrysojasminum humile f. farreri
intro: Chrysojasminum humile f. farreri is a plant species in the jasmine family, known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, it has been used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and stress, due to its adaptogenic properties and ability to regulate the body's response to stress. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-anxiety effects. In herbal preparations, Chrysojasminum humile f. farreri is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and enhance overall well-being.
